summary: FINAL COMPREHENSIVE REVIEW (Iteration 21) - All features tested and verified. 38/38 backend tests passed (100%). Complete frontend UI testing completed with all major flows working correctly. Platform is ready for launch.

issues: Google Maps shows billing error due to API key domain restriction - this is a known API key configuration issue, not a code bug

backend_api_tests: POST /api/auth/register - validates password length (400 for <6 chars)
POST /api/auth/login - returns token and user for valid credentials
GET /api/auth/me - returns user profile with has_subscription field
GET /api/providers - returns list with is_featured sorting
GET /api/providers/{id} - returns detail with is_featured field
GET /api/care-requests - providers can see care requests
GET /api/proposals/my-sent - providers can see sent proposals
GET /api/proposals/received - clients can see received proposals
GET /api/sos/info - returns SOS info with is_available
frontend_ui_tests: Landing page loads correctly with search form
Login form works with email/password inputs
Provider Dashboard shows all tabs (Solicitudes, Galeria, Zonas, Reservas, Disponibilidad, Resenas, Calificar Clientes)
Subscribed provider sees 'Cuenta Premium Activa' card
Provider sees care requests with 'Enviar Propuesta' buttons
SOS Emergencia section shows in provider dashboard with schedule
Search page shows 17 providers with correct sorting
Service type filters (Todos, Paseo, Cuidado, Daycare) work
Client Dashboard shows links to historial, reservas, mascotas, favoritos, mensajes
Client sees subscription card with $9,990/mes price
Historial page shows Servicios and Facturas tabs
Free client sees 'Mensajeria Bloqueada' screen on /chat
Admin panel shows stats, tabs, and SOS config with start_hour/end_hour
Navbar dropdown shows 'Historial y Facturas' link
Notification bell shows unread count badge

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 is the FINAL COMPREHENSIVE REVIEW before launch. All features have been thoroughly tested: Authentication, Provider Search with sorting (featured first), Subscriptions with differentiated pricing ($9,990 client, $7,500 provider), Bookings, Care Requests & Proposals, Chat with asymmetric subscription logic, Notifications, Pets CRUD, SOS Veterinario with schedule (8:00-20:00), Reviews, Admin Panel with all tabs. The Google Maps error on the search page is a known API key domain restriction issue, not a code bug. All backend APIs return correct responses. All frontend pages load correctly and integrations work as expected.

features_verified.authentication: PASS - Register validates password, login works, /me returns profile with subscription status
features_verified.provider_search: PASS - Returns sorted list (featured first), filters work, detail includes is_featured
features_verified.subscriptions: PASS - Client plan $9,990, Provider plan $7,500, invoices endpoint works
features_verified.bookings: PASS - CRUD works, history endpoint returns completed bookings
features_verified.care_requests: PASS - Clients create requests, providers see them, proposal system works
features_verified.proposals: PASS - Subscribed providers can send, clients can accept/reject
features_verified.chat: PASS - Free clients blocked, subscribed users can message, free providers can respond to client-initiated
features_verified.notifications: PASS - List, unread count, mark-all-read work
features_verified.sos_veterinario: PASS - SOS info includes is_available based on schedule (8-20)
features_verified.admin_panel: PASS - Stats, provider management, plan management, SOS config with hours
features_verified.frontend_navigation: PASS - All routes load, dropdowns work, links functional
features_verified.subscription_ui: PASS - Free users see subscription prompts with correct pricing

known_issues.google_maps: RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key needs domain authorization (not a code bug)
